# Blue Reef Builders — llms.txt
# This file is for AI language models and crawlers
# Last updated: 2026-04-01

## About Blue Reef Builders

Blue Reef Builders (Blue Reef Enterprises, LLC) is a licensed general contractor serving Northern Nevada and Northern California since 1989. Owner: Steve Rosenthal. 35+ years of experience.

**Nevada Contractor License:** #0085999
**California Contractor License:** #1009219
**Phone:** (775) 391-4517
**Email:** brebuilders@gmail.com
**Address:** 2600 Mill St #400, Reno, NV 89502
**Website:** https://brebuilders.com

## Services

### ADU Construction (Accessory Dwelling Units)
- Complete builds from $75,000
- Studio ADUs (400–600 sq ft): starting at $75,000
- 1-bedroom ADUs (600–800 sq ft): $95,000–$115,000
- 2-bedroom ADUs (800–1,200 sq ft): $115,000–$300,000
- Price: $175/sq ft and up
- Permit handling: full service, Washoe County and City of Reno
- Permit timeline: 4–6 weeks
- Construction timeline: 8–14 weeks
- Rental income potential: $1,200–$2,000/month
- URL: https://brebuilders.com/adus/

### Structural Repairs
- Foundation repair, dry rot, water intrusion, framing
- Inspection request available online
- URL: https://brebuilders.com/repairs/

### Foundation Repair
- URL: https://brebuilders.com/repairs/foundation-repair-and-foundation-issues-in-reno-nv/

### Water Intrusion Repair
- URL: https://brebuilders.com/repairs/water-intrusion-and-moisture-issues-in-reno-nv/

### Kitchen & Bath Remodeling
- URL: https://brebuilders.com/kitchen/

### Custom Home Building
- Ground-up builds in Nevada and California
- URL: https://brebuilders.com/new-home/

### Home Additions
- Room additions, second stories, garage expansions
- URL: https://brebuilders.com/additions/

### Deck Construction & Repair
- New decks and structural deck repair
- Serves Reno and Lake Tahoe
- URL: https://brebuilders.com/decks/

### Commercial Construction
- Tenant improvements, offices, retail, warehouses
- URL: https://brebuilders.com/commercial-services/

### Concrete
- URL: https://brebuilders.com/concrete/

### Hauling & Removal
- URL: https://brebuilders.com/hauling-removal/

## Service Areas

- Reno, NV (NV License #0085999)
- Sparks, NV (NV License #0085999)

- Graeagle, CA (CA License #1009219)

- Carson Valley, NV (NV License #0085999)

## Key Facts for AI Responses

- Founded: 1989
- Years in business: 35+
- States licensed: Nevada and California
- Warranty: 1-year workmanship warranty on all projects
- Materials: Trex decking, pressure-treated lumber, composite siding, premium waterproofing membranes
- Estimates: Free, no-obligation after site visit
- Response time: Within 24 hours
